S2 E1 Xena and Gabrielle travel to the centaur lands to help them against Dagnine, a man who once fought at Xena's side. Xena meets a young boy called Solan and she tells Gabrielle he's actually her son.
S6 E1 The tyrannical patriarch of a dysfunctional but wealthy family summons his adult children for a Christmas reunion, but prior to the holiday his throat is slashed apparently by one of them.
S6 E2 The tyrannical patriarch of a dysfunctional but wealthy family summons his adult children for a Christmas reunion, but prior to the holiday his throat is slashed apparently by one of them.
S6 E3 A spate of petty thefts is followed by a series of brutal murders at a student hostel in London.
S6 E4 A spate of petty thefts is followed by a series of brutal murders at a student hostel in London.
S4 E4 After Martin befriends a reclusive writer both Frasier and Niles admire, they become obsessed with reading the author's first manuscript in decades.
S4 E5 While filling in for Frasier, Niles gains fame after counseling a local basketball star who's in a slump.
S4 E6 After Daphne gets dumped by her boyfriend, Niles decides it's time to declare his love for her.
S4 E7 Frasier and Lilith join forces so that their son can gain admission to the most prestigious private school in Boston.
S3 E11 John-Boy's feelings of inadequacy are washed away in a flood of pure vanity when circumstances lead to the publishing of a book of his short stories.
S3 E12 A part-time job catapults John-Boy into the middle of a desperate emotional battle raging in the heart of a hopelessly blind young woman.

programmes.t: The New Adventures of Wonder Woman
programmes.d: E14 Megalomaniac Marion Mariposa is putting together a dream team of athletes to represent Mariposalia in the next Olympics. He does this by kidnapping them and threatening their loved ones.

programmes.t: The New Adventures of Wonder Woman

programmes.d: E16 An attempt on Diana Prince's life give her a clue that elusive assassin for hire Woodward Nightingale has a contract out on a target with the initials 'C.R.A.I.'.

E9 In 1824, Kizzy learns the ultimate fate of her parents. Meanwhile, Mingo teaches Kizzy's son George how to become a cockfighting trainer. This eventually leads to huge unexpected changes in George's status.
E10 In 1859, George returns home, he finds his son Tom, now a blacksmith. When the Civil War begins, Tom is recruited and cruelly mistreated, when he meets a come an important part of their lives.

Kisah dua orang sahabat yang mula merasai kewujudan cinta di antara mereka namun merasa malu dan keliru untuk mengungkapkannya. Dibintangi oleh Ratu Rock Ella Aminuddin dan Hans Isaac.

Ikuti gandingan lucu AJ dan Salleh dalam aksi mereka dalam menyelesaikan kes penyeledupan lukisan yang amat berharga. Lakonan AC Mizal & Harun Salim Bachik.

Munirah menjumpai sebuah nota cinta di dalam sebuah buku yang diperolehi secara rambang dari 'blind date with a book' dan cuba untuk menemukan pasangan di dalam nota tersebut yang merubah hidup Munirah.

How the son of an adviser to Iran Supreme Leader Ayatollah Khamenei became a major player in international energy markets.
Airplane Thief. The story of Chinese spy Ji Chaoqun, who was a promising young engineer from Beijing heading to the US to study, until China's spy agency came calling with bags of cash.
Exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond, Bloomberg Originals is business as you've never seen it.
A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, hosted by David Westin in New York.
Live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets.
Your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. Hosted by Yvonne Man and David Ingles.
The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.

Live from London, we catch you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. Plus, we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

programmes.d: E20 This week's Big Interview sees two of Chelsea's biggest stars from different generations come together for a football masterclass.

programmes.t: The Big Interview: Ep09: Cody Gakpo
programmes.d: E9 Since joining Liverpool in 2023, Cody Gakpo has become a key figure at Anfield - playing a major role in their Premier League title win last season.
We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2014/2015 season.
E17 Liverpool and Spain star Luis Garcia selects his ultimate Premier League eleven, choosing from the best players he played alongside in England.

programmes.t: PL Stories: Ep11: Liverpool - the Succession Story
programmes.d: E11 When Arne Slot guided Liverpool to their 20th League title in his debut season, it marked the beginning of a new era, yet echoed a familiar tradition.

E52 We dive into the fiercest rivalry in English football. As Liverpool draw level with United's record haul of top-flight titles, this is a story of history, pride, and the relentless pursuit of greatness.

programmes.t: Rewind: Ep14: Aaron Ramsey: My Arsenal Years
programmes.d: E14 Aaron Ramsey was one of Arsenal's key players for a decade under Arsene Wenger.
We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2009/2010 season.

programmes.t: Rewind: Ep13: Adam Lallana: My PL Years
programmes.d: E13 From the depths of League One to becoming a Premier League and European champion, Adam Lallana emerged as one of English football's standout talents of the 2010s.
E17 Liverpool and Spain star Luis Garcia selects his ultimate Premier League eleven, choosing from the best players he played alongside in England.
A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of Luis Suarez who excelled in 2013/2014.
We take a look back at some of the most spectacular and important goals from previous Premier League seasons.
E29 Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.
E30 Extended sit-downs and more informal 'out and about' interviews with the Premier League's biggest stars, providing players with a platform to tell their story in their own words.

programmes.t: PL Stories: Ep40: Pgmo and International Women's Day
programmes.d: E40 We mark International Women's Day by celebrating the women shaping refereeing across the professional game.

E220 After 20 years, Tyas tries to find her father, Mahdi, to be the guardian of her marriage to Gino. Tyas' fiance, Gino is shocked to find Hani, Tyas' sister who has a child from their past relationship.

E12 Undercover agent Poon catches drug lord Kuen Sai Ho, who gets a light sentence. He enlists 3 female operatives to infiltrate the Lau family, while Chief Inspector Kwok grows wary of his secret agenda.
A high school student befriends a street punk as she copes with college entrance exam pressure and ruthless bullying. A murder investigation is set to alter both their lives.
The Police sets up a special task force to track down a serial killer who leaves death notices stating when, how and who he will murder. In the process, they expose an even bigger conspiracy behind.
Hao Ren inherits the skills of Locksmith Shan and befriends Detective Liu who often seeks his help. When Hao Ren unveils the mystery of Shan's wife's disappearance one day, strange events ensue.
With his family destroyed by drug dealers, Zhang Yao teams up with detective An to take down the drug lords. As the revenge plot unfolds, do they share a common foe or harbour personal agendas?

Mei Zhen's family appears to get along but harbours secrets - she struggles at work, her brother hides his separation and their mother fears her past will affect them. Can they overcome these hurdles?
Ching is a forensic psychiatrist who can enter a person's subconscious. As she investigates a murder-cum-suicide case, she finds herself under suspicion and comes face-to-face with a past trauma...
Gao is in prison as she steals to buy a cochlear implant for her daughter. She befriends 3 women there and upon release, they stand together to defy fate and support each other in life's challenges.
Hong Kong is rocked by a series of cold-blooded murders whose victims are runaway suspects of unsolved cases. The group of killers calls themselves The Chosen Sleuths.
Adapted from a novel of the same name by Erica Li, an urban sketcher suffering from ALS asks his crush to fulfill his one last wish by becoming his girlfriend for just one day.

programmes.t: The Sunny Side of the Street
programmes.d: A Pakistani refugee receive help from a taxi driver after his father died in a car crash. They gradually develop a father-son relationship, until Hassan discovers the truth behind his father's death.
A year ago, Bo became blind in a serious car accident. One day, an intruder enters her house and takes her hostage. As she tries to survive, she discovers her husband's involvement in her accident!

programmes.t: Twilight of the Warriors: Walled In
programmes.d: Young Chan Lok Kwun accidentally stumbles into the dangerous Kowloon Walled City, subsequently finding purpose amid chaos and gaining wisdom while becoming one of the City's protectors.
A remake from the Japanese movie Key of Life, Andy Lau, Xiao Yang and Wan Qian stars in this action comedy about the switched identities of an unsuccessful actor & a professional assassin.

Based on the Mekong River massacre, Zhang Han Yu & Eddie Peng star as members of a task force bent on bringing down a drug cartel, with Malaysia providing the backdrops for breath-taking action scenes.
Winner of 8 HKFA awards & featuring an all-star cast, this film depicts an elite team guarding Dr Sun Yat Sen in Hong Kong, as he discusses plans to overthrow the Qing dynasty.
As a juror in a high-profile case learns that his daughter has been mysteriously kidnapped, he must decide whether to use his special skills to influence the trial as demanded by the kidnappers.
When an unidentified corpse is found at a residential unit, the residents fear that its presence will turn their home into an ill-fated house, leading to a chaotic endeavor to remove the body.
De & family goes on a drive to Changbai Mountain, where their magical holiday turns tragic when their 8-year-old son goes missing. Will they be able to find him before the cold winter takes him?
In snowy, surreal Hong Kong, an explosion kills a secret drug lord tycoon. As chaos erupts, his youngest son fights his fugitive brother and warring factions to destroy the family's criminal empire.
A veteran and a passionate street dancer both strive to reach their goals and pursue their dreams in street dancing. After overcoming many challenges, can they finally shine on stage?

programmes.t: Quan Dao: The Journey of a Boxer
programmes.d: Ah Niu learned boxing since young & uses his skills to help the weak. When his friend is brutally beaten up, Ah Niu accepts a death combat challenge to help him take revenge.
Ad executive Lin uncovers her boyfriend's affair with a champion boxer and challenges her to a match. Under the former boxing legend's training, her quest for revenge evolves into self-discovery.
Two elderly couples fall deeply in love and prove that love never ends, even if there is no tomorrow!
An ex-singer returns to his hometown & takes part in a water drilling contest to save his drought-stricken town, only to discover a fierce and deadly beast lurking underground!
Despite his family's expertise in ancient Chinese relics, Xu Yuan resents their fraudulent ways. However, when fate shows him a route to redeeming their reputation, will he survive it?
In snowy, surreal Hong Kong, an explosion kills a secret drug lord tycoon. As chaos erupts, his youngest son fights his fugitive brother and warring factions to destroy the family's criminal empire.
A family torn apart 8 years ago during a disastrous winter solstice dinner reunites when their cousin returns home from England, hoping to mend relations after things had fallen apart.
In the second installment of Louis Chais famous novel, Wei Xiao Bao is trapped again between his responsibilities to the country or takes side to the anti-Qing movement.
When Fleur join her university's hip hop team, a journey begins which lead her into the heated world of dance competitions and a complicated romance.
A 40-year-old high school teacher is in midlife crisis, his marriage is on the rocks and he is involved in a taboo romance with a female student who has a crush on him.
Specializing in overseas security jobs, The Wolf Pack discovers that terrorists are planning to destroy the country's energy source. Lead by Lao Diao, the pack must move out to stop them!
Featuring three stories about two high school friends, a magician and a lost man, the movie reveals the most terrifying and ugly side of human nature, where life and death are just a thought away!
Mumu connects her deaf father to the outside world, but their peaceful life is disrupted when she must adapt and fit in to the hearing world, while her father is ensnared by a gang to commit crime.
Guy and Heidi face pre-marital strife. Meanwhile, Grey Bear doubts his wife's fidelity and Ken faces a life crisis following his girlfriend's pregnancy. Can they resolve their relationship issues?
In this sequel to THE BULLET VANISHES, Sean Lau plays an inspector who is lead down a rabbit hole of discovery as he investigates a prison escape.
A prisoner escaped under Master Zhang's custody, causing his expulsion. He sets off to find the prisoner, only to discover that the war between humans & demons have begun!
A top-rated film based on a true case in Hong Kong, it tells of a young man who plots with his friend to murder & dismember his parents, resulting in a highly controversial court case.
July and An Sheng's strong friendship is put to the test when they encounter a guy, Su Jia Ming, sparking a love triangle that alters both their destinies.
Miu Ling, who dreams of becoming a secret agent, accidentally rescues an injured spy. He agrees to make her his apprentice, turning her upside down as she goes on madcap adventures.
Set as a prequel, when the sun was found to be dying, humans build enormous engines on the Earth's surface to find a new home. To save the world, a group of young people decide to step forth.
Bored with their mundane country lifestyle, a retired superhero couple sets out to make a comeback at the upcoming Martial World Assembly.
Based on Yuan Taiji's novel, this drama depicts how a young assassin takes his first mission while investigating his family's massacre - and finds himself far deeper than he expected.
The owner of a small cleaning company, Chak, experiences a tough time during the pandemic. When he employs single mother Candy as his assistant, she became his saving grace.
Hua, Fei and Guo are robbed when transporting gang money. When Hua discovers that Fei and Guo are connected to the robbery, he must choose between loyalty and brotherhood.
Gao is in prison as she steals to buy a cochlear implant for her daughter. She befriends 3 women there and upon release, they stand together to defy fate and support each other in life's challenges.
A Hong Kong drama written & directed by Kearen Pang, former talent manager Mei Fung retired to take care of her husband & son, but decides to return to work to find her value in life.
Kiki and Sean, who have been together for seven years, betray each other three days before their wedding. Faced with 'perfect' partners, they abandon their responsibilities and part ways.
When the Stone Monkey is defeated by the God of War, he loses his power & falls into the mortal world. Can he fulfill the promise he made to a desperate little girl and save the world?
When a flash of her groom's infidelity is revealed at their wedding, Bo cancels the entire affair. However, within a year, he comes knocking on her door again.
In this screen adaptation of Louis Cha's famous novel, Stephen Chow plays small time punk Wei Xiao Bao alongside an all-star cast.

A former professional racer falls into despair after causing his brother's death. He meets Dr. Hui & becomes an ambulance driver. Meanwhile, his friends uncover the truth behind his brother's accident.
S1 E5 Jamie makes an Italian-inspired pepper stew, a deliciously thrifty roast chicken dish, low-cost DIY takeaway kebabs and air-fried stuffed apples with custard.

programmes.t: Big Zuu & AJ Tracey's Rich Flavours
programmes.d: S1 E2 Up in Bonnie Scotland, Zuu and AJ head to the luxury 'old money' estates of the rich and high society. They eat the most expensive haggis in the world (coming in at £4000), and sample scotch whiskey.
S1 E4 Guillaume enjoys the finer parts of Parisian life found in the 7th and 8th arrondissements, including a visit to the Eiffel Tower and a meal at the iconic Jules Verne restaurant.

S1 E1 In the Lake District, Rick shares mutton hot pot with sheep farmer and author James Rebanks. He meets an intrepid shrimp fisherman and is joined by his son Jack to cook his mum's shepherd's pie.
S1 E5 Nisha Katona cooks an oxtail and shin curry, spiced barbecued prawns, and a tahini banana bread and butter pudding with candied bacon and pecan bourbon ice cream.
S5 E7 The team help the Clarke family, whose home has been overwhelmed by the hobbies they love, leaving little room for everyday life.
S1 E4 Guillaume enjoys the finer parts of Parisian life found in the 7th and 8th arrondissements, including a visit to the Eiffel Tower and a meal at the iconic Jules Verne restaurant.
S1 E1 Donal Skehan shows us how to make midweek comfort food, including a mushroom gnocchi, prawn pasta and an air-fryer tofu ramen.
S1 E7 Amanda and Alan's plans to create an open-plan living and dining room are jeopardised when they come up against a huge structural wall dividing the two spaces.

S1 E2 Over the course of recorded time, many species have been threatened with extinction. Once-powerful animal empires - like the dinosaurs - have been completely wiped from the planet.
S1 E3 As the popular characters of songs and stories, farm animals are celebrated all over the world. But few stories tell of their sister species who live in the wild.
S1 E4 Uninvited guests. Using sheer numbers to claim a territory, some animal groups are considered 'pests.' But their very survival may depend on finding a home where they're not welcome.
S1 E5 There's strength in numbers. Especially in the wild. For many species, it's the very reason why individuals come together. Protecting the empire is imperative to survival.
S1 E6 Epic flights, adventurous sea journeys and exhausting road trips all play a key part in the lives of many species. These empires travel in search of food, shelter or a mate.
S1 E6 Beni faces his weigh-in while Alba is back in isolation. Pujon reclaims his position as gang leader. A team heads out to rescue an infant orangutan.
S1 E7 Rescued orphan Josh needs his broken wrist examined, and Beni visits the dentist to treat his bad breath. Having overcome her typhoid infection, Alba is reunited with her old friends.
S1 E8 It's a first at forest school. Inside the clinic, the team meets a mysterious new creature. It turns out to be a sun bear - the tiniest of all bears!
S1 E9 Clara and baby Clarita are strong enough to move to Bangamat Island, but are met with a hostile reception. Kasper is ready to be released in the wild.
S1 E10 These orangutans have come a long way! Six jungle school graduates are finally set free, ready to start a new life in a National Park.
S1 E1 Navigate the harsh Mongolian wilderness with Dan as he searches for The Dude, the largest snow leopard ever recorded.

S1 E1 Dive to the darkest depths of the sea to uncover the ocean's most mysterious inhabitants. Journey across vast stretches of open water with humpback whales, and witness breathtaking bioluminescence.

S1 E2 Venture along Earth's coasts, where colliding worlds create a melting pot of biodiversity. Watch orcas hunt with precision, crawl to safety with turtle hatchlings, and see crabs sculpt sandy galaxies.

S1 E3 Trace dazzling waterways all over the world, from volcanic rivers in Russia's far east to geothermal streams in Florida. Watch as beavers transform entire landscapes with their well-engineered dams.

S1 E4 Journey through mystical lakes, where life adapts, survives, and transforms. Witness the power of ancient beasts like the snapping turtle, and walk tall with flamingoes as they brave corrosive waters.

S1 E5 Unmask the eerie beauty of swamplands, which have inspired centuries of folklore and serve as a vital link between life and death. Swim with hungry crocodiles, and watch carnivorous plants snap up prey.
S1 E6 Freeze time as water becomes a force of change in Earth's most frigid ecosystems. Hunt for unsuspecting seals with polar bears, and try out a unique survival strategy with Arctic foxes.

S2 E2 Palau is a tiny country with a big story.
Nearly 20 hours of sunlight a day feed the season of abundance. Warmth unlocks water from the glaciers, ice caves and waterfalls.
S2 E1 In a park where land meets sea, the natural elements combine to create wonderful variety. Cola-colored water feeds forests green and dense.
S2 E2 In the northern reaches of the Kruger National Park, life depends on one thing - water. In a land burdened by heat and drought a single ribbon cuts its reliable course through the wilderness.
S2 E3 Augrabies is where the mighty Orange River plunges over the awesome 56 meter Augrabies waterfall.

S2 E4 Food, water and shelter are essential to all life on earth from the smallest of beings to the largest, and along the banks of one of Africa's greatest rivers, some animals struggle while others thrive.

S2 E5 In the heart of Zululand, South Africa, lies the oldest game reserve on the African continent - Hluhluwe-iMfolozi. Here, Southern white rhinos have found protection from people in times of turmoil.
S1 E4 A manmade lake in Minneriya National Park supports the largest concentration of elephants in Asia.

S1 E5 Monsoon storms sweep over the tropical island of Sri Lanka, and water carried in with swirling mists hits the mountainous heartland, beginning a journey through the many changing faces of the forests.
S1 E6 Yala National Park is an avian Eden, home to 215 species of bird. This paradise offers many possibilities for parents who can weather the ever-changing climate.
S1 E1 Millions of years ago, castaway creatures found themselves stranded on Madagascar's rugged shores. Isolated from the mainland, the newcomers were left to evolve.
S1 E2 The island is the land of Lemurs. Lemurs are fascinating arboreal primitive primates of Madagascar represented in all sizes, colors, and shapes from the largest Indri to the tiny mouse lemur.
S1 E2 Sniff around The Dude's territory with Dan and his team, who suspect that females may play a bigger role than they originally thought.
S1 E1 Face a life-and-death struggle with vet Bec, who gives a koala joey mouth-to-mouth, and see vet Meaghan test her microsurgical skills on a baby fruit bat's teeny toes.
S1 E2 Watch senior vet Tim tutor new recruit Phil through an injured koala checkup, and track the team's solutions for animals plagued by the summer heat.
S1 E3 Check out vet Phil's clever tactics for handling prickly patients and marvel as RSPCA rescuer Chantel extracts a sooty possum duo from a chimney.
S1 E4 Join the team's scramble to help a trio of distressed baby wallabies and a koala joey who's having seizures.
S1 E5 Wade into recovery mode as the clinic deals with the animal aftermath of a Brisbane flood. Meet a baby kangaroo in need of round-the-clock care and a plover washed down a drain.
S1 E6 Observe vet Karina's fight to save a koala mauled by dogs, then face the clinic's toughest customer with vet Tim: a rainbow lorikeet who's quick to bite.

programmes.d: The grandfather of a human girl is killed after offending a fox fairy in the mountains. Years later, the girl marries Feng Lou, the murderer who killed her grandfather, in an attempt to take revenge.

Under siege from the feudal lords, emperor Zhou Su Wen relies on a special technique to transform himself in order to survive. Living in the village, he learns the meaning of responsibility & justice.
During the struggle for the dragon throne, the Empress reveals that the Emperor has a hidden son. She appoints Man Shu to find the one who would be the true heir to the throne.

E31 Based on 'Wu Geng Ji' anime, starring Ren Jia Lun, Xing Fei, Zhu Xu Dan and Zhu Zheng Ting. Prince Wu Geng, enslaved after his kingdom's fall, seeks revenge, leading humans against divine oppression.

E32 Based on 'Wu Geng Ji' anime, starring Ren Jia Lun, Xing Fei, Zhu Xu Dan and Zhu Zheng Ting. Prince Wu Geng, enslaved after his kingdom's fall, seeks revenge, leading humans against divine oppression.
Pei Xing is famous for being an 'unkillable' & cold-blooded assassin. But after witnessing great injustice, his dormant chivalry gradually awakens and he decides to retaliate in kind.
To invade the global financial system, a criminal organization kidnaps AI expert Fang Li. His wife, Ya Mei, a retired former ATO agent, rejoins the organization to rescue her husband.
Gangster Chu Tian Kuo involuntarily participates in a competition to win the golden mask. But during the struggle for the mask, he is framed & subsequently rescued by the princess of a foreign tribe.
Upon discovering his girlfriend's disappearance, virologist Zhang Xuan travels to a foreign country to find her & becoming involved with bringing down conspirators plotting a global pandemic.
Yu Huan wants to marry his childhood sweetheart Xiao Yu but is stopped by a huge bride price. With three goofy friends, he tries to raise money but accidentally awakens a century-old lake monster.
E23 Amid chaos, five souls unite in Japan—royalty, rebels, and warriors—witnessing the fall of empire and the birth of a new era. Destiny calls in a revolution that changes China forever.
E24 Amid chaos, five souls unite in Japan—royalty, rebels, and warriors—witnessing the fall of empire and the birth of a new era. Destiny calls in a revolution that changes China forever.
Gao Cheng set sail in search of an ancient ship carrying countless treasures that mysteriously vanished, only to end up on a mysterious island inhabited by a primitive tribe & alien creatures.
The Sword Sect faces Lady Golden Snake's revival after her seal breaks. Demon Qu Ling and disciple Bian Xiaoya unite to reclaim the sword and seal her.
On a stormy night, 8 people gather in a dilapidated temple to take shelter from the rain. They begin discussing the legend of the Water Ghost Bride, kick-starting a series of mysterious murders.
Ten years later after the death of General Yang Ye, Yang Ba Jie & Yang Jiu Mei are determined to regain their father's lost treasured blade & restore the glory of the Great Song Empire.

programmes.t: Treasure Hunting Of The Dragon In Shanghai Beach
programmes.d: At end of the 19th century, patriot hero Liang Chao entrusted his closest friend Li Tian Feng with the secrets to a hidden treasure, urging Li to unearth the treasure for the sake of the nation.
After a member of the powerful eunuch party dies suddenly and mysteriously, Chu Mo of the Imperial Guards is appointed to investigate the case, which leads him to reveal a conspiracy.
The fight for a mystical treasure begins after the death of Shen Shijie, the world's richest businessman, who built an impenetrable vault to seal up his huge wealth.

programmes.t: Extreme Speed Police-The War on Drugs
programmes.d: Based on a true drug case, this gripping tale follows anti-narcotics officers risking their lives in deadly missions, vowing to wipe out drugs and safeguard the peace of the people.

Gil-gu falls for his new neighbor, Sun-ji. She is sweet by day but appears uncanny at night. He later learns that there is a devil inside her and wants to unravel her curse.
A former navy commander receives a threatening call who claims to blow up a stadium with a sound-responsive bomb. He must face the secret he left buried in the deep sea to track this terrorist down.
The investigation following a sales manager brutally killing his entire family leads to a track of mystery and tragedy in an overwhelmed work team at Seoul.
A woman, living by herself, finds her door lock cover left open one day. Startled by this, she starts investigating on her own and finds more hints of someone trying to enter her home.
A married couple unwittingly become involved in a rescue operation of a hijacked aircraft during their first-ever family trip abroad to Hawaii.
Personnel of the North and South Korea embassies must join hands to escape from war-torn Somalia.
Mysterious deaths on plane forced the pilot to call for an unconditional emergency landing.
Yeon-gyu has never gotten what he wanted in life. With Chi-geon's help, he joins the gang and struggles to hold on to hope, but soon finds himself facing even more dangerous situations.
Believing power is paramount, Tae-soo aspires to become a prosecutor. As he achieves his goal and rises swiftly to power, he also sees the cruelty of a life at the top hierarchy in 90's Korea.
After being released from prison, a man learns that he has a daughter, thus wishes to leave the gangs and live an ordinary life. Yet the new leader of the gangs feels being betrayed...
Director Kim has completed filming Cobweb, but he decided to re-shoot the ending. With chaos and people don't understand the new ending, will Kim be able to complete his masterpiece?
Based on a popular web-based series, a mobster meets a headstrong lawyer who he falls in love with at first sight and ignites a desire to change for the better.
Juri with depression is stuck at home during COVID. As her mother went visit Juri's grandmother, Juri has to run their Kimbap restaurant until her mother returns.
Being discriminated as a woman, Jeong-eun was dispatched and given great pressure to resign, but she is not willing to simply give up...

A radio DJ receives a letter written 23 years ago in the past. Through the letter, the story of his first love and friendships of five friends are revealed.

While a zombie-virus breaks out in South Korea, passengers including a father and young daughter, a couple, and several students struggle to survive on the train from Seoul to Busan.
A rookie basketball coach lead 6 'no-body' players for straight matches in 8 days and turn the impossible possible.
Jin-bong is a former archery medalist and forced to be an archery coach for his company's hidden motives. He meets 3 bowmen in the Amazon Rainforest and embarks on an adventure with them.
Dok-ja is the only reader of an obscure web novel for 10 years. Suddenly, the apocalyptic world of the novel becomes reality. He and the novel's omnipotent hero strive to save the world.
Mysterious deaths on plane forced the pilot to call for an unconditional emergency landing.
The excitement of winning a lottery ticket doesn't last long for sergeant Chun-woo as it accidentally ends up crossing the Military Demarcation Line. He must get his act together and find it again!
Three lifelong friends get wrapped up in a robbery-arson case. Suspicious of the investigation and the police, Hyun-tae starts digging for the truth himself and asks his best friend for help.
A protest against urban renewal leads to death of a cop and a teen. The boy's father was arrested for the cop's death. A young attorney is assigned to defend the father.
So-hee moves to a house in the rural area which is an inheritance from her husband. Later, she has an eerie feeling and believes the house has something to do with her husband's death.

With the help of his three wives, an Indonesian witch doctor called Ahmad Suradji admitted to killing 42 women over a period of 11 years.
E3 Heartbreaking accounts of families torn apart by crime. Ashley Wallace, who was almost killed by her own mother, Jenny Carrieri, whose search for her sister's murderer consumed her life.
E4 Tales of toxic love triangles-wives who stray from their husbands with disastrous results, a deadly case of online catfishing, and a lonely young woman who has an affair with a killer.

E7 One FBI undercover agent meets with suspects in Denmark in an effort to retrieve one of the world's lost treasures; another agent takes on an unlikely suspect believed to be planning a murder for hire.

programmes.t: Cold Case Files: Murder in the Bayou
programmes.d: E1 When the body of free-spirited Bonnie Ruphard, 47, is spotted by a runner in Lafayette, LA, police suspect domestic violence.

S3 E4 A home invasion results in a man being beaten to death and set on fire. As investigators race to find the perpetrator, a shocking 911 call pits two brothers against each other in the interrogation room.
S2 E7 A simple snack at a local restaurant turns violent when a grandmother is ripped off, but does not give up. A woman takes on the man who slammed into her van and then tries to run.
S2 E15 A young woman is brutally attacked on the train by an assailant; a coach witnesses a student with a gun roam the hall; a store clerk faces a suspect trying to rob him with an unusual weapon.
S1 E3 A man proposes to his girlfriend while getting arrested; an aquarium worker helps catch a shark thief; a horse and buggy turns dangerous when a drunk man is operating it; and more.

S2 E3 A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a super-fan takes an unwelcome swim at a celebrity's house; a man goes wild at the gym and on the streets of Miami-totally naked; and more!
E1 In the shadow of the Rockies, Carolyn Jansen, 43, is found dead, stuffed into a duct-taped container. Detectives have two suspects but no clear way to tell who is the killer.
E2 When the blood-smeared car of 27-year-old Stefanie Watson is found in a Maryland parking lot, her family holds out hope she's still alive.

S2 E5 A woman in Hancock is picked up on traffic warrants, but when she is booked, a surprising charge threatens her freedom. A belligerent man busted for being drunk in public requires medical attention.

S6 E1 Greg Baker was a mathematician and calligrapher, and a devout Christian. He was disabled and reliant on caregivers. One of those was Thelma Yvonne Purchase, who took his life to get her hands on his money.
S5 E143 A convicted murderer denies masturbating during a psychological evaluation; a judge has no time for Sovereign Citizen tactics; a defendant drops the f-bomb in bond court; and more.
S5 E144 A shocking turn of events in a murder trial: a mother confronts the woman who stole her baby; a grieving widow screams at the man who killed her husband; and more.
S15 E101 A massive, gang-related melee outside a nightclub leaves Gwinnett County detectives struggling to identify just who shot a young murder victim.
S9 E10 When an accomplished young musician and local stage actress is found lifeless in her own bed, no one in Hartford, Wisconsin, can figure out what happened.

programmes.t: Beyond the Headlines: Black Girl Missing
programmes.d: Companion piece to the movie Black Girl Missing. While the media goes into a frenzy over missing white girls, Black women's disappearances receive muted coverage and limited police resources.
S26 E525 A Mobile homeowner reports a theft of $9,000 to the police, and just thirty minutes later, a local father of three is mysteriously killed on their front porch.
S2 E12 After rideshare driver Carolina Vargas drove a nice stranger to his hotel, she didn't have qualms about giving him another ride. But her trusting gesture turned tragic.
S9 E10 When an accomplished young musician and local stage actress is found lifeless in her own bed, no one in Hartford, Wisconsin, can figure out what happened.

S2 E5 Matt Riffle investigates the murder of a New Orleans native, who was shot and killed after a brief altercation. Det. Tanisha Smith investigates the homicide of a mother and the abduction of her daughter.
E9 An unlicensed midwife assists a home birth that ends in tragedy. The defence says she made the right calls, but the prosecution charges her with negligent child abuse resulting in death.

S2 E3 A family faces off with violent attackers trying to rob their jewelry store; two young women flee from a driver out to get them on a terrifying road trip; convenience and crime collide at a bank ATM.

S3 E5 A woman calls 911 with a story of being abducted and forced into the trunk of her car by a masked assailant who fatally shoots her girlfriend.

An infamous Hong Kong gangster well-known for robbing jewellery stores with AK-47 assault rifles, he also has a knack for escaping police custody.
E4 Linda Carty was sentenced to death on February 19, 2001 for the kidnapping of three-day-old newborn Ray Cabrera, and the kidnapping and murder of his mother, Joana Rodriguez.

S1 E7 Arthur Shawcross tells a lot of stories about his life before he began to kill. He might have been known for killing women along Rochester's Genesee River, but his first murder was years earlier.

E4 The Sheriff's Office in DeRidder, Louisiana, receives a distressing phone call from the owner of Dee's Motel. The man tells them that he's found a woman dead in room 6.

E5 Detectives gather crucial information about a double-homicide from neighbourhood surveillance footage, but they're not able to identify and track the killer until some key digital data is uncovered.

S2 E12 After rideshare driver Carolina Vargas drove a nice stranger to his hotel, she didn't have qualms about giving him another ride. But her trusting gesture turned tragic.
S1 E10 After being pursued by handsome Kevin Lewis, Amanda can't wait to marry her new man. But on their honeymoon, Amanda discovers a different side to Kevin - he likes things done a certain way.
E4 The Sheriff's Office in DeRidder, Louisiana, receives a distressing phone call from the owner of Dee's Motel. The man tells them that he's found a woman dead in room 6.
S3 E11 Exotic animal dealer William 'Wild Bill' Zelenski is accused of murdering his girlfriend's 18-year-old son, Ryelee Manente-Powell, after he stole $27,000 worth of venomous and exotic reptiles.
Follow the Royal Malaysian Police as they go in pursuit of sinister Nigerian gangs who deceive or coerce hundreds of Malaysian women into smuggling drugs.
S2 E13 After an 80-year-old woman vanishes, local police and the FBI team up in the pursuit of a suspected serial killer.
S2 E14 At the scene of a chilling triple murder in Northern Maine, detectives recover DNA evidence that suggests an out-of-town visitor may be behind the brutal crime.
S15 E8 Terri blames hoarding on her busy schedule, but past trauma reveals the truth. After a fire raised safety concerns, she must clean up with the Hoarders team.
E3 Undercover agents Lyle Kirian and Brian Townsend embed themselves in two different but equally dangerous worlds in order to investigate suspected local gang members and the Mexican cartel.
S9 E10 When an accomplished young musician and local stage actress is found lifeless in her own bed, no one in Hartford, Wisconsin, can figure out what happened.

S6 E2 10-year-old Karen Pedley was hailed a hero when she saved her family from a fire. That event triggered a lifelong obsession, one which would lead to her setting alight the nursing home where she worked.
S1 E10 Growing up gay in the hyper-masculine Bayou was tough on Ronald Dominique. An inability to connect and a prison sexual assault would cement his decision to ultimately kill his first victim.
S2 E15 A young woman is brutally attacked on the train by an assailant; a coach witnesses a student with a gun roam the hall; a store clerk faces a suspect trying to rob him with an unusual weapon.
S2 E7 A simple snack at a local restaurant turns violent when a grandmother is ripped off, but does not give up. A woman takes on the man who slammed into her van and then tries to run.

S1 E2 Over the course of recorded time, many species have been threatened with extinction. Once-powerful animal empires - like the dinosaurs - have been completely wiped from the planet.
S1 E3 As the popular characters of songs and stories, farm animals are celebrated all over the world. But few stories tell of their sister species who live in the wild.
S1 E4 Uninvited guests. Using sheer numbers to claim a territory, some animal groups are considered 'pests.' But their very survival may depend on finding a home where they're not welcome.
S1 E5 There's strength in numbers. Especially in the wild. For many species, it's the very reason why individuals come together. Protecting the empire is imperative to survival.
S1 E6 Epic flights, adventurous sea journeys and exhausting road trips all play a key part in the lives of many species. These empires travel in search of food, shelter or a mate.
S1 E6 Beni faces his weigh-in while Alba is back in isolation. Pujon reclaims his position as gang leader. A team heads out to rescue an infant orangutan.
S1 E7 Rescued orphan Josh needs his broken wrist examined, and Beni visits the dentist to treat his bad breath. Having overcome her typhoid infection, Alba is reunited with her old friends.
S1 E8 It's a first at forest school. Inside the clinic, the team meets a mysterious new creature. It turns out to be a sun bear - the tiniest of all bears!
S1 E9 Clara and baby Clarita are strong enough to move to Bangamat Island, but are met with a hostile reception. Kasper is ready to be released in the wild.
S1 E10 These orangutans have come a long way! Six jungle school graduates are finally set free, ready to start a new life in a National Park.
S1 E1 Navigate the harsh Mongolian wilderness with Dan as he searches for The Dude, the largest snow leopard ever recorded.

S1 E1 Dive to the darkest depths of the sea to uncover the ocean's most mysterious inhabitants. Journey across vast stretches of open water with humpback whales, and witness breathtaking bioluminescence.

S1 E2 Venture along Earth's coasts, where colliding worlds create a melting pot of biodiversity. Watch orcas hunt with precision, crawl to safety with turtle hatchlings, and see crabs sculpt sandy galaxies.

S1 E3 Trace dazzling waterways all over the world, from volcanic rivers in Russia's far east to geothermal streams in Florida. Watch as beavers transform entire landscapes with their well-engineered dams.

S1 E4 Journey through mystical lakes, where life adapts, survives, and transforms. Witness the power of ancient beasts like the snapping turtle, and walk tall with flamingoes as they brave corrosive waters.

S1 E5 Unmask the eerie beauty of swamplands, which have inspired centuries of folklore and serve as a vital link between life and death. Swim with hungry crocodiles, and watch carnivorous plants snap up prey.
S1 E6 Freeze time as water becomes a force of change in Earth's most frigid ecosystems. Hunt for unsuspecting seals with polar bears, and try out a unique survival strategy with Arctic foxes.

S2 E2 Palau is a tiny country with a big story.
Nearly 20 hours of sunlight a day feed the season of abundance. Warmth unlocks water from the glaciers, ice caves and waterfalls.
S2 E1 In a park where land meets sea, the natural elements combine to create wonderful variety. Cola-colored water feeds forests green and dense.
S2 E2 In the northern reaches of the Kruger National Park, life depends on one thing - water. In a land burdened by heat and drought a single ribbon cuts its reliable course through the wilderness.
S2 E3 Augrabies is where the mighty Orange River plunges over the awesome 56 meter Augrabies waterfall.

S2 E4 Food, water and shelter are essential to all life on earth from the smallest of beings to the largest, and along the banks of one of Africa's greatest rivers, some animals struggle while others thrive.

S2 E5 In the heart of Zululand, South Africa, lies the oldest game reserve on the African continent - Hluhluwe-iMfolozi. Here, Southern white rhinos have found protection from people in times of turmoil.
S1 E4 A manmade lake in Minneriya National Park supports the largest concentration of elephants in Asia.

S1 E5 Monsoon storms sweep over the tropical island of Sri Lanka, and water carried in with swirling mists hits the mountainous heartland, beginning a journey through the many changing faces of the forests.
S1 E6 Yala National Park is an avian Eden, home to 215 species of bird. This paradise offers many possibilities for parents who can weather the ever-changing climate.
S1 E1 Millions of years ago, castaway creatures found themselves stranded on Madagascar's rugged shores. Isolated from the mainland, the newcomers were left to evolve.
S1 E2 The island is the land of Lemurs. Lemurs are fascinating arboreal primitive primates of Madagascar represented in all sizes, colors, and shapes from the largest Indri to the tiny mouse lemur.
S1 E2 Sniff around The Dude's territory with Dan and his team, who suspect that females may play a bigger role than they originally thought.
S1 E1 Face a life-and-death struggle with vet Bec, who gives a koala joey mouth-to-mouth, and see vet Meaghan test her microsurgical skills on a baby fruit bat's teeny toes.
S1 E2 Watch senior vet Tim tutor new recruit Phil through an injured koala checkup, and track the team's solutions for animals plagued by the summer heat.
S1 E3 Check out vet Phil's clever tactics for handling prickly patients and marvel as RSPCA rescuer Chantel extracts a sooty possum duo from a chimney.
S1 E4 Join the team's scramble to help a trio of distressed baby wallabies and a koala joey who's having seizures.
S1 E5 Wade into recovery mode as the clinic deals with the animal aftermath of a Brisbane flood. Meet a baby kangaroo in need of round-the-clock care and a plover washed down a drain.
S1 E6 Observe vet Karina's fight to save a koala mauled by dogs, then face the clinic's toughest customer with vet Tim: a rainbow lorikeet who's quick to bite.

S1 E1 It's spring: the season of courtship and new life.
S1 E2 Summer brings long, warm days for wildlife to thrive. Watch animals learn new skills, compete for mates, and escape predators as they try to make the most of the short season.
S1 E3 Dry season in Zambia means new life for the Nsefu pride of lions along the Luangwa River.

E9 Rachael prepares a popular Tuscan dish of red wine-infused beef stew served with creamy polenta.
E10 Racheal teams up with her friend, chef and author, Anna Gass, to make an Italian version of fried grilled cheese, also known as a carrozza, along with a hearty roasted tomato soup.

programmes.t: Because This Is My First Twenty
programmes.d: E1 Global star Kim So Hyun, prepares for her first journey to the US at the age of 20. Once there she meets with Aimee Song, a global fashionista with five millions of followers.
E10 Bryan has a genetic condition that may be causing the huge mystery bumps on his head. Chalamar cannot dress how she wants because of her ugly chest bump, which she dubs 'a turd'.
The Route 40 Killer targets sex workers with an unknown motive. Detective Linda Murphy goes undercover and gets entangled in a chilling cat-and-mouse game, reminiscent of The Silence of the Lambs.
Olivia never wanted to be known as a product of nepotism, but as a rising star in her father's firm, that's exactly how people see her. Determined to prove herself, she meets Jonathan Rothfield.

S3 E3 These homes have been selected for how they reflect the tastes and personalities of their owners. We'll introduce you to the 'Colourful House' and a 'Planterior' home featuring the 'Jenggala' style.

E1 South Korean actor Kim Nam-gil embarks on a journey with his companion, Lee Sang-yoon. Their first destination is the Punch Bowl village, a place marked by the pain of the divided Korean Peninsula.

E7 James and his team take on a massive seven-bedroom zombie home with a terrible layout and a huge, rotting pool house in the backyard. Partner Andy has brought the project to James, hoping for a big payday.
E1 From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.
S1 E7 Rachael shows us how to make an impossibly delicious brunch menu of parm frittata with tomato sauce, served with a side of sausage and a simple salad that you can eat all day.
S1 E8 This classic childhood combo gets an adult makeover that will make your mouth water. Rachael shows us her version of creamy tomato soup and a spicy grilled cheese.
S1 E9 Rachael demonstrates how to make her version of a Thai whole-fish and fish-fillet supper, served with a corn and cherry tomato salad with fresh basil and mint.

E1 South Korean actor Kim Nam-gil embarks on a journey with his companion, Lee Sang-yoon. Their first destination is the Punch Bowl village, a place marked by the pain of the divided Korean Peninsula.

Lucy has just escaped an abusive relationship when she meets the kind Frank, but when she discovers that Frank is stalking her, she decides she's had enough of abusive men and turns the tables on Frank.
When web model Kara gets disturbing messages from a fan, influencer Cody comes to her aid. But when the stalker begins to show up in person, 'IRL' takes on a whole new level of meaning for Kara.
Novelist Sarah becomes a prime suspect in a homicide after a one-night tryst with a mysterious stranger who turns up dead at her summer home.

programmes.t: The Plot to Kill My Mother
programmes.d: A young woman who unknowingly grew up in federal witness protection reels after her mother's murder, leading her to question everything. She decides to leave the program and find the killer.
Olivia never wanted to be known as a product of nepotism, but as a rising star in her father's firm, that's exactly how people see her. Determined to prove herself, she meets Jonathan Rothfield.
Novelist Sarah becomes a prime suspect in a homicide after a one-night tryst with a mysterious stranger who turns up dead at her summer home.
E8 On their final night in Mongolia, the Earth-Cleaning Bros reflect under a sky full of stars - no signal, no power, just nature. But peace turns to panic as temperatures drop to - 10°C.

E11 Julie and Julian spend most weekends escaping the hustle of city life by sailing, swimming and enjoying the coastal lifestyle. Now they have decided to turn their ocean escapes into their main job.
E12 Despite being from different parts of the world, Raquel and Samir first bonded over their shared love of the ocean. Now married, they are racing to find the perfect coastal home.
E11 Rachael prepares a hearty and healthy meal for her Italian friends, combining store-bought and homemade ingredients to make flavourful, protein-rich ramen bowls.

E12 Rachael prepares a traditional pollo al mattone, an Italian roast chicken, by seasoning spatchcock chickens, cooking them in a pan with a brick wrapped in tin foil, and serving them with sauteed greens.

programmes.t: Because This Is My First Twenty
programmes.d: E2 Will So Hyun get a chance to become a Hollywood actress 10 years after she launched her acting career?

E11 Dave is a firefighter and avid cyclist whose bump gets in the way of wearing various helmets. Bree empowers others on social media by accepting her own psoriasis, but it has recently become too painful.
When web model Kara gets disturbing messages from a fan, influencer Cody comes to her aid. But when the stalker begins to show up in person, 'IRL' takes on a whole new level of meaning for Kara.

Fleeing her abusive ex, Jess hires a fishing-boat captain to take her across Lake Superior to a new life in Canada. When an accident leaves her washed up on shore, she's taken in by a lighthouse keeper.
S3 E4 Today's theme is 'Gallery vs. Natural' interiors. We'll be showcasing homes that highlight the contrast between the bold gallery style and the serene natural aesthetic.

E2 The journey heads towards the picturesque water city of Chuncheon. Nam-gil and Sang-yoon meet a travelling doctor who works in remote villages without medical facilities and join him on his rounds.

E8 James decides to join up with a former flip partner to attack a zombie house in the form of a 1940s brick bungalow. The deal is overshadowed by the 'ghost flip', a flip gone bad from the past with Brian.
E2 From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

S1 E10 Rachael teaches us how to make the ultimate mushroom-lover pasta, featuring varieties like chicken and hen of the woods, rainbow oysters and more, with taleggio cheese sauce and ribbony egg pasta.

S1 E11 Rachael is taking a traditional ballpark sausage sandwich to the next level. Her recipe calls for seasoned, bone-in pork chops cooked on an iron skillet, with fennel, peppers, onions and red wine.
S1 E12 Rachael shows us how to whip up a French country-inspired, tangy, creamy chicken dinner with vinegar and tarragon, served with a simple salad and a baguette with soft butter.

E2 The journey heads towards the picturesque water city of Chuncheon. Nam-gil and Sang-yoon meet a travelling doctor who works in remote villages without medical facilities and join him on his rounds.
The Route 40 Killer targets sex workers with an unknown motive. Detective Linda Murphy goes undercover and gets entangled in a chilling cat-and-mouse game, reminiscent of The Silence of the Lambs.

programmes.t: Single Black Female 3: the Final Chapter
programmes.d: After being wrongfully convicted of murder, Monica has finally been proven innocent. All charges have been dropped and the police have shifted their focus to Simone, their number-one person of interest.
Frankie leaves foster care to attend an exclusive Swiss boarding school. Turns out, the opportunity comes at a deadly price when a classmate is murdered and everyone is quick to blame Frankie.
Two mothers battle to see which of their overachieving daughters will be accepted to a prestigious university, but when one of their methods quickly spiral out of control, the games become deadly.

Fleeing her abusive ex, Jess hires a fishing-boat captain to take her across Lake Superior to a new life in Canada. When an accident leaves her washed up on shore, she's taken in by a lighthouse keeper.
Frankie leaves foster care to attend an exclusive Swiss boarding school. Turns out, the opportunity comes at a deadly price when a classmate is murdered and everyone is quick to blame Frankie.
S3 E67 In this episode Rachael's in party mode and she's firing up popcorn with popcorn chicken. If you like those both super-spicy, you've come to the right place at the right time.
S3 E68 Rachael takes us on an Aegean adventure with a recipe for Greek-style lamb meatballs and her very own creation: feta-sghetti, a spaghetti dish served with a decadent white feta sauce.

programmes.t: Because This Is My First Twenty
programmes.d: E5 So Hyun talks about her life as an actress and as an ordinary 20-year-old girl. Her fans give her some tips to enjoy her journey in the States.
S17 E40 It's freight to plate in this elimination, as the contestants choose from international destinations to inspire their cooking. The top eight spots are up for grabs.
S1 E25 Waking up early one morning, the Dokbakz are all hungry and ready to head out for breakfast. But when they arrive at the restaurant, they are met with an unexpected surprise.

programmes.t: Because This Is My First Twenty
programmes.d: E6 So Hyun enjoys a day in Las Vegas. A short but fantastic limousine tour presents her with an unforgettable memory of Las Vegas.

programmes.t: Single Black Female 3: the Final Chapter
programmes.d: After being wrongfully convicted of murder, Monica has finally been proven innocent. All charges have been dropped and the police have shifted their focus to Simone, their number-one person of interest.
A romantic road trip turns into a woman's desperate search for answers when the car she and her boyfriend are driving breaks down in a creepy backwater town. Then the boyfriend vanishes.
S13 E13 The chefs face their toughest Mystery Box challenge yet - fish! When the chefs with immunity are able to switch up the other contestants' fish, the competition starts to fire up.

S1 E15 When a horrible tragedy befalls someone close to her, Theresa continues to deliver messages while experiencing her own grief. Things get intense when the victim of tragedy makes himself known to Theresa.

A girl vows to take revenge against the 4 outlaws who murdered her parents when she was only a baby. To do so, she trains hard at martial arts and teams up with a swordsman to kill them.
Chiang Li Ping plays a scorned wife, while Elaine Chin Yen Ling is the mistress who teaches the hypocritical husband that what goes around, comes around.
In this saga of warring clans, revenge and the ultimate martial arts skills, Yun, a young swordsman, battles the odds to avenge his father's death.
In this sequel, the Mad Monk is joined by immortal scholar-turned-genie, Lu Tung Pin, as they both wreak havoc in an attempt to outdo each other!
In seeking to avenge his six comrades' murders, a swordsman must battle against Qiao Qing Monastery's notorious monks.
After Ah Niu moves to Hong Kong, a kind-hearted fellow from rural China is taken advantage by cunning characters including his uncle.
When a swordswoman falters in her attempt to reclaim her murdered husband's 'Green Sword', the world's sharpest blade, her protg continues her quest.
Asiapol agent Yang Ming Hsuan sets out to apprehend George Eaton, a high profile thug who has escaped to Hong Kong. With home support, can Yang take him down?
Winner of Best Martial Arts Award at the 1978 Asian Film Festival, this piece is directed by Liu Chia-liang and features his brother, Gordon, as a martial arts master.
A young couple lived happily in a house but the woman becomes haunted after she accidentally kills her husband.
It's a no-holds-barred battle to the death for possession of the invaluable Purple Sword, as the Five Tigers take this adventure to the outer limits.
In this adapation of a Qiong Yao novel, a young woman finds lust, trouble, and, finally, happiness at a picturesque farm.
A motorcycle workshop owner feels compelled to damn the physical and legal consequences and go on racing.
While returning the stolen Golden Sword to the palace, a sword master's daughter is pursued and poisoned by an evil master, only to return as a spirit to take revenge against the evildoer.
Three women and three men beguile, blackmail, bicker and backstab each other all the way to a shocking surprise ending.
An old grudge between the families of the Ching and Ming supporters in Kwang Tung, finally draws a young man back to avenge his father's death.
Take a vacation with sexy Lily Ho and Jimmy Lin Chong on a whirlwind tour of Southeast Asia in one of Shaw Brothers most lively 1960's musical romances.
Wang Yu grows from a playful boy to a reformation hero against the Ching Dynasty, rising to protect his homeland and loved ones.
The Mad Monk rushes around saving hawkers from crumbling walls and bullies, recovering stolen money and punishing a ruthless court official and his son.
A Chinese martial arts student (Wang Yu) trains hard to defeat the karate expert (Lo Lieh) who brutally killed his master and peers.
Hsu Hsia, a great kung fu actor himself, both directs and leads a team of four martial arts choreographers in his hilarious tale of 'kung fu pickpockets.'.
A drifter (David Chiang) and another swordsman (Ti Lung) are competitors for a woman's love who fate turns into brothers in arms.
Catch superstar, Linda Lin Dai, in one of her most acclaimed roles in this story of forbidden love between a country maiden and the emperor.
Loyal to the emperor, the protagonist attempts to stop the delivery of a message depicted across twelve gold medallions that is to be delivered by traitors.
Adapted from the novel Water Margin and starring Ti Lung, this award-winning drama depicts how the courageous Wu Song defeats a tiger, and his bond with Wu Da Lang.
Director Chor Yuan teams with star Ti Lung and famed novelist Chu Yu in the creation of this intriguing kung fu saga.
Two lovers who return to announce their marriage plans discover that their families are in conflict over land. Can they mend this broken bond?
Various people are out to get the Shadow Whip (an individual, not just a weapon). Starring Cheng Pei Pei and Yueh Hua.
Enjoy Lo Wei's very last Shaw Brothers film, the fabulous tale featuring Li Ching of a frostbitten swordswoman out to get her parents' murderers.
Controversial director Chu Yuan combines stars to create a masterpiece about Hong Kong society's differing views on love and what women expect of it.
When the younger of two brothers becomes a villain, tragedy lurks when his elder brother makes it his mission to take him down.
Pressured by his parents to marry prior to taking over his father's business, Guan rejects every girl they find but then, he stumbles upon the perfect one?
An anti-Ching gambling addict (Wang Yu) befriends a man (Gordon Liu), little knowing that his new pal is the emperor in disguise!
After a guilty Alex confesses his affair to Tung, his injured wife, she somehow ends up living with Alex's mother and his mistress under the same roof!

programmes.t: The Sword Stained With Royal Blood
programmes.d: Havoc dogs a swordsman who uncovers a sword, training manual, treasure map and a secret message on the body of a deceased master.
This fascinating, humorous box office smash captures a cross-section of Hong Kong society and their issues -- all crammed into a single tenement building.
In The Kung-fu Instructor, Ti Lung plays hero Huang Yang, a righteous weapon instructor whose main concern eventually becomes his survival.
Whenever Mr. Funny Bone travels about with his sidekick Big Potato, he often gets involved in all manner of charming comic mishaps.
The great martial clans of China seek to meet with the new Sun and Moon Sect leader and hatch a plan to resist invaders from the west.
Directed by Lee Han-hsiang and starring Michael Hui, this blockbuster confirms Hui's versatile talents as the king of comedy.
Featuring the unforgettable song Country Road, Shaw's Huangmei Opera stars Ivy Ling Po and tells the tale of a poor student engaged to a billionaire's daughter.
The Shaw Brothers' directors created this 60's classic depicting a timeless romance between a wealthy man and a songbird.
This compelling Shaw Brothers Huangmei Opera depicts the romance of star-crossed lovers the son of a respected government official and a famed prostitute.
As the aggressive Chin Empire conquers the Chao Kingdom and drains the Wei empire, adventure, intrigue and tragedy abound as the armies march into battle.
Three single females and the men they fall for think things are simple and blissful until the lasses' parents enter into the picture.
Desperate to win a dare in which he has to acquire a sword from a legendary swordsmaker, a swordsman takes it by foul means and has to pay the price.
A young woman's life turns tragic after she discovers that she's adopted and then goes in search of her real mother.
Two men find more than they bargained for when they attempt to investigate the apparent murder of a swordsman.

When villains 'Winged Tiger' Teng Fei and 'Underworld King' Yin Te Lung unite, the martial arts world is plunged into chaos. Can this deadly duo be stopped?

In this tale of greed, lust and vengeance, only Silver Swallow can stop the golden blade.

Kung fu queen Cheng Pei-pei plays a swordswoman on a mission to find the bandits who killed her parents and save her country from foreign invaders.

Three different women face disappointment in their respective love lives. One has an unfaithful husband, another's lover is career-obsessed and the third has a wealthy suitor who is not right for her.
Aryan and Nandini, two fellow collegians, fall in love and elope as their parents disapprove of their relationship. However, they land in trouble when they are abducted by Donga, a terrorist.
After being disowned by her family, an awkward librarian relies on the help of her brooding neighbour.
This biographical movie narrates the story of Chandro and Prakashi Tomar, who defied ageism and patriarchy to take up shooting in their 60s.
When a powerful politician falls for a strong-willed superstar, their passionate romance quickly spirals into a dangerous game of obsession, pride and heartbreak.
After she's accidentally trapped in a walk-in freezer at work, a young woman fights to stay alive as her father and boyfriend launch a search for her.
An Adivasi 13-year-old from Telangana becomes the youngest girl in history to climb Mount Everest.
This biographical movie narrates the story of Chandro and Prakashi Tomar, who defied ageism and patriarchy to take up shooting in their 60s.
When a powerful politician falls for a strong-willed superstar, their passionate romance quickly spirals into a dangerous game of obsession, pride and heartbreak.
A girl decides to sprint out of her own wedding and has people from not one but two countries chasing after her.
A quiet, sweet tempered housewife endures small slights from her well-educated husband and daughter every day because of her inability to speak and understand English.
A thug helps kidnap grooms in order to avoid paying out dowries for their upcoming marriage.
Set in 1971, when the winds of war were blowing between India and Pakistan, Raazi, an adaptation of Harinder Sikka's novel 'Calling Sehmat' is a true-life story involving a 20 year old Kashmiri girl.

It's pretend play fun! The siblings have a water balloon pirate battle and pretend to be a rescue team!

The whole crew is to the rescue! They save a stranded Blue, help Kat in an out-of-control car and make a beach!

It's messy mayhem in the clubhouse! A slime volcano erupts and a magic mirror makes lots of colorful Bobas!
It's time to help out! JJ pretends to be a doctor, bakes a cake for Mom and goes on a nature walk with Bingo!
It's Jill's super creative adventure! She decorates a dress and makes her shoes sparkle with stickers!

It's sports and fun! The siblings play soccer, go on a beach treasure hunt and ride first class on a train!

Blippi visits a science center! He sees butterflies and cool fish before learning about prehistoric dinos!
Mila and Morphle take on the baddest baddies! They stop robot versions of themselves and an evil Orphle!
Mila and Morphle battle evil robots and race villains! They stop a faulty Robofreeze and a cheating Winston!
Join the Air Asia Buds on a high-flying adventure around the world, from exploring a fire station and a farm to visiting exciting cities like Bangkok.
Join the VeeFriends for friendly battles, from an egg and spoon race and a staring contest to a fun-filled water balloon fight and a game of hide-and-seek.
Join Mia and best friends Oskar and Tilly on their wild adventures, as they explore a whimsical land together.
Join Mia and best friends Oskar and Tilly on their wild adventures, as they explore a whimsical land together.
Blippi has a bouncy bash! He learns about bouncing animals and tries rock climbing at a trampoline park!
Meekah learns about cool vehicles! She digs with an excavator and learns about professional NASCAR racing!
Adilla controls Willow, forcing an alliance with Zak when roaches try to destroy the Shrinkinator.
After finding the last part, the team is captured by Adilla, leading to an all-out war to defend the shed.
The Supa Strikas must use their skills and determination to win the Super League trophy!
The Supa Strikas must use their skills and determination to win the Super League trophy!
The Supa Strikas must use their skills and determination to win the Super League trophy!
The Oddbods are having a tough time! Slick quits Fuse's boot camp and Pogo and Jeff get into an ice cream war!
The Oddbods are in a panic! Fuse and Pogo get stranded in Jeff's house and Pogo's ice cream makes zombies!
The Dino Master's origin is revealed, just as the ranchers become the caretakers of his mischievous nephew.
It's a day of fun and chaos! A rainbow turns the dinos different colors and Asher gets lost in a big box fort!
The ranchers' colossal quest to California hits a snag when a surprise dino stampede creates a roadblock.
Blippi counts down his TOP 10 ANIMAL episodes!
Blippi counts down his TOP 10 favorite Construction episodes!
Blippi counts down his favorite Space and Science moments.
Gecko is on the ultimate rescue missions! He saves Eric from a storm and stops a rocket-powered truck!
It's Gecko vs. Weasel! They have a car wash competition and Weasel tries to steal the plans for the Mechanicals!
It's a day of epic rescues and Weasel's fails! Gecko saves a flying monster truck filled with Weasel's helium!
It's bath and bedtime fun with Baby John! He learns to swim with family and learns colors in the bath!
Baby John's on a big world adventure! He explores a reptile zoo, visits an insect park and goes to space camp!
JJ learns to stay healthy! He learns to use the potty, washes his hands and goes to the doctor for a checkup!
It's a fun school day with JJ! He learns the alphabet with blocks and sings about the five senses!
Everything is going wrong for Joey and Boo! Joey gets stuck to a spider and they get encased in drops of cement!
A juicy berry is in trouble! The Antiks are on a heroic mission of teamwork and bravery to save it.
Blippi learns how awesome things work! He explores a firetruck, an F1 race car, a monster truck and a crane!
Blippi meets amazing animals! He helps a sauropod stuck in mud and meets a corgi who is a real-life knight!
Baby John's on a big family adventure! He takes his first plane ride, visits an aquarium and explores a fair!
Baby John's on a fun learning adventure! He plays dress-up, learns his colors and says 'please' and 'thank you'!
JJ shares his favorite stories! Hear the tales of 'The Three Little Pigs' and 'The Tortoise and the Hare'!
Do the dino stomp with Blippi! He digs for fossils with Elmo and jumps in a giant bouncy castle!
Blippi is on a great dino egg hunt! He learns about fossils at a nature park and sings the Dino Song!
Meekah's on an adventure! She explores a playground and learns about her emotions with some fun puppets!
The Oddbods are having a challenging day! Fuse is scared to skydive and Zee can't stop eating cupcakes!
The Oddbods have new arrivals! A popcorn-obsessed alien invader arrives and Zee has to babysit his relatives!
Baby John meets our local heroes! He learns about police officers, firefighters and becomes an ambulance driver!
Baby John learns about yummy food! He discovers veggies are delicious and makes colorful, healthy popsicles!
JJ goes on a nature walk! He learns to help the Earth and sings nursery rhymes like 'Ten in the Bed'!
JJ plays his favorite games! He plays freeze dance, makes funny faces and builds with construction vehicles!
Meekah learns something new! She learns coding basics, how recycling trucks work and plays an alphabet game!
Blippi visits an amazing petting zoo! He learns to care for animals, feeding ducks and playing with puppies!
It's a super fast dino race! Blippi searches for dinos in a forest and has a foot race with a raptor!
S1 E2 A rockslide blocks Ted the bus and his passengers in a mountain pass. Mojo's mighty dozer top will make short work of those rocks... if Mojo and Bo can work together!
S1 E3 JoJo is determined to slide down the big slide at the park. But even though it's sunny when they leave the house, a rainy weather forecast threatens her plans.
S1 E2 JoJo and Gran Gran miss their bus home, so the pair settle down to wait for the next one. But getting the bus isn't quite as simple as JoJo thinks it is.
S3 E17 Cake decides to teach Sarah and Duck how to decorate with icing!
S3 E18 Sarah's hat goes on an adventure without her, on top of a balloon.
S24 E15 Gordon tries to tell Rebecca how to pull the express like he does, but Rebecca proves that her way may not always be as loud or fast, but works just as well.
S1 E9 When Bluey forgets to put her favourite toy away, Socks grabs it! The kids stage a horsey wedding to distract her, with Dad and Uncle Stripe as the horses!
S1 E10 Bluey and Bingo run a crazy 'Hotel' with Dad as their put upon guest. But when Bingo quits over Bluey being too controlling, Dad needs to teach them how to compromise.
S1 E11 Bluey is struggling to learn how to ride her bike. But as she and Dad watch her friends determination with their own tasks, Bluey is inspired to give it another try.
S2 E23 Evil Pea uses her balloon to cut down everyone's kites so she can rule the supermarket skies. Supertato and Carrot must use chopsticks to stop her.
S3 E22 It's time for the summer fair. Eugene is the organiser, but it's so much work that he quits!

S3 E23 The Squirrels are exploring in the attic when they find an old cassette tape, and decide to make a mixtape for Duggee to remind him of all the happy memories they've made while earning their badges.
S1 E1 At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.
S1 E49 The Go Jetters race to protect ancient artwork in Peru, when Glitch erases the Nazca Lines.
S1 E50 The Go Jetters swing into action when Glitch uses real landmarks for his crazy golf course.
S2 E1 Can the Go Jetters rescue the ancient city of Petra when Glitch causes in an earthquake?
S1 E2 Ria and Rohan cook their delicious version of a classic Indian dish, tandoori chicken, cooked in a clay oven called a tandoor.

S1 E8 Andy, Jen and Scout head to Alaska, in America, on a baby animal mission to solve the mystery of fish being buried underground. Andy meets a grizzly bear cub setting out on its first fishing trip.
S8 E20 Captain Captain's Uncle Joe King is coming to visit. Uncle Joe is the best joker in the family and Captain Captain has got a big plan to play a joke on him!

S1 E6 The toys are having a racing game: Ho-Ho speeds on a bamboo scooter; Krash is driving an old and comical looking small car; Raccoon is speeding on a super racing car; Amelia is flying in the air.
S1 E47 Bluey needs her Mum's advice on dealing with a troublesome neighbour, when the serenity of her couch cushion playhouse is threatened by Bingo's own growing stable of animals.
S1 E48 Bluey, Bingo and Mum get into a debate with Dad about the definition of teasing. As they recall all the times where he's been a Big Teaser, Dad argues that he was only just playing.
S1 E49 Dad tells Bluey to mind her manners at the table - they're not animals. But when Bluey gets her hands on a stick of magic asparagus, she shows them everyone's got a wild side.
S1 E48 The Cobs have finally had enough of Evil Pea's ungratefulness and team up with Supertato.
S5 E13 The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!
S5 E14 Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'.
S5 E15 When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.
